title: Triple T, Totem ( Tung Tung Tung Sahur)
description: This project replaces the default texture of the totem of undying to tung tung tung sahur
body:
Tired of the default Totem of Undying? Want something with more personality… and a lot more chaos?

This texture pack replaces the standard Totem of Undying with the legendary Tung Tung Tung Sahur meme, turning every near-death moment into a dramatic (and slightly unhinged) experience.!

![1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03548e1eb865359affb9778ac96ddd5f15eada6f.png)

Instead of silently cheating death, you’ll now be saved with the spiritual energy of 3AM sahur vibes. Whether you’re clutching a hardcore world, escaping lava, or barely surviving a creeper blast, this pack makes sure your survival is anything but normal.
